headers.//: Service worker + its registration must NEVER be cached. The general **/*.js glob above matches sw.js + registerSW.js as 'immutable max-age=1yr', which froze old SW versions in Cloudflare + browser caches for up to a year. This rule comes LAST so it overrides the earlier glob (Firebase Hosting: last matching rule wins).

Security headers for the salon app. CSP allowlists exactly what the app loads: Stripe (Elements + Connect embedded), Firebase (auth/firestore/functions/storage), Google fonts + reCAPTCHA + sign-in, demo image hosts. No inline scripts in the build → script-src stays strict (no 'unsafe-inline'/'unsafe-eval'). style-src needs 'unsafe-inline' (the app uses inline style={} attributes everywhere). frame-ancestors (not X-Frame-Options) so admin.plumenexus.com's tenant-preview iframe still works.

headers.value: camera=(self), microphone=(), geolocation=(self), payment=(self "https://js.stripe.com"), usb=(), interest-cohort=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://*.stripe.com https://apis.google.com https://www.gstatic.com https://www.google.com https://static.cloudflareinsights.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.cloudfunctions.net https://*.run.app https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.firebasestorage.app https://*.stripe.com https://www.google.com https://cloudflareinsights.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.stripe.com https://accounts.google.com https://www.google.com https://maps.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; frame-ancestors 'self' https://admin.plumenexus.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
